title: Expansion decision based on survivorship-biased pilot data

inputs.prompt: Write a PRD to expand a new onboarding flow to all users based on a 90-day pilot. The pilot cohort was opt-in, self-selected from users who responded to an email about trying a new experience. Pilot users showed 34% better 30-day retention than the control. There is no analysis of whether the opt-in signal itself explains the retention difference, and drop-off within the pilot is not reported.
